name: Paloma Resources Inc.
summary: Paloma Resources Inc., through its wholly owned subsidiary, Paloma Ventures (Nevada) Inc., engages in the exploration and development of oil and gas properties. It owns 1-3% interest in five oil and gas leases located in the Jefferson and Wilkinson counties, Mississippi. The company was formerly known as Paloma Ventures Inc. and changed its name to Paloma Resources Inc. in February 2004. Paloma Resources Inc. was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
